content.en:
"That kind of top-level battlefield, you don't need me to help, you still have to defend the Winter Night Fortress!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In a short period of time, the Supreme Dao Void Demon side should not continue to invade here, and many Supreme Dao Realms in the Winter Night Fortress will have time to rest and recuperate.

And Ye Tian also has time to grow.

He had now obtained so many Black Abyss Devouring Stones, was refining penance, and the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were also rapidly improving.

When the third wave of the Supreme Dao Void Demon attacks, his strength will skyrocket.

"Hey, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance Development Treasure Trove has been exchanged. "

After Ye Tian entered the Supreme Void, he was surprised.

This time.

The Innate Origin Domain Alliance also knew that many fortresses had suffered heavy losses, and many of them were seriously injured in the Dao Realm, so this time they developed a treasure trove exchange, and many resources that were not allowed to be exchanged in the past were taken out this time.

All sorts of goodies, all over it.

There are even sixth sequence supreme rule items, but the cost of exchanging them is too great, and you have to get a lot of merit.

And now, the battle exploits of each Dao realm are being sorted out.

And how to record the exploits of the battle, it must not rely on numbers, but on deduction.

It is almost impossible to deduce with some kind of deduction-type Nine Patterns Supreme Dao Treasure.

Of course.

In such a big battle, the battle merits are not valuable, even if Ye Tian has killed so many Supreme Dao Void Demons, it does not mean that the battle merits he has obtained are higher than those of the Su Domain Lord.

The battle merit is not only to kill the Ultimate Dao Void Demon, but also to see the role played.

For example, the Su Domain Lord blocked a powerful Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, which was a great battle feat.

The specific merits of the battle are determined by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

Soon.

Ye Tian inquired about his combat exploits in the Supreme Void.

"58 million feats!"

There are a lot of feats in this battle, and they can be exchanged for a lot of good things.

"It's a pity that the fifth sequence of Dao rule items can't be exchanged. "

This kind of thing is urgently needed even by the Sioux, who will take it out?

The Innate Origin Domain Alliance had not yet become rich to this extent, so it was naturally impossible to take out this kind of item.

It is already very good to be able to take out the sixth sequence of Dao rule items, but the required combat merits have reached hundreds of millions.

"Like the Taibai Sword Master, they are estimated to have to work hard to obtain hundreds of millions of battle merits!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Ye Tian's target was not the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, he looked at the materials such as the Supreme Blood Stone, the Supreme Dao Spirit Root, and the Crimson Blood Gold, which he could refine into the Supreme Blood Spirit Liquid.

The Blood Essence Liquid he had refined before had been exhausted, and if he wanted to raise his cultivation to the peak of the Sixth Rank Dao Realm, he had to refine a large amount of Blood Spiritual Liquid.

Soon.

Ye Tian exchanged all 58 million battle exploits for these materials.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

A man in black appeared outside Ye Tian's mansion.

"Ye Domain Lord, what you want has been delivered!"

This man in black is a black-clothed guard within the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, specializing in delivery and delivery for official members.

After all, the official members are guarding the fortress everywhere, and they can't leave, and they can only be delivered by the black guards.

Of course, their strength is not weak, almost all of them are above the sixfold Dao realm.

Like this man in black, his cultivation has reached the sevenfold Dao realm.

Wow!

Ye Tian came out, made sure that there was no mistake in the goods, and nodded: "Well, the thing is correct!"

"Ye Domain Master, I'll retire!"

The black-clad guard quickly left.

Immediately, Ye Tian entered the mansion and began to refine the blood spirit liquid.

One after another to the blood spirit liquid was refined by him, and the other copy body next to him was directly refined to the blood spirit liquid to improve cultivation, not wasting time at all.

......

Heavenly blood is a vein, and the Canglong Department is in the department.

At this time, all the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons and Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons here were all annoyed.

"Blood hub, you are responsible for the invasion of the Winter Night Fortress, this time the loss is too great, eighteen eighteen eightefold supreme Dao Void Demons have fallen, and nearly six hundred sevenfold supreme Dao Void Demons have been killed, such a loss, are you the first to command?"

A top-notch Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon said coldly.

This top-notch Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon is the patriarch of the Canglong Clan, the Blood Dragon!

Although the blood dragon did not possess the supreme bloodline, it was second only to the supreme bloodline, and his cultivation had reached the peak realm of the ninefold supreme Dao Void Demon, and he had also comprehended the rules of the fifth sequence of the supreme path to the ninety percent seven realm.

He is the number one powerhouse here.

The blood hub trembled at this time, and hurriedly explained: "Blood Dragon Patriarch, you can't blame me for this! Who would have known that the Winter Night Fortress hid a very demonic Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm, comparable to our Supreme Bloodline, and also comprehended the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao, the key is that he still has several clones. Even His Highness the Blood Crouch of our clan has not been able to defeat the other party. And several of his clones suddenly attacked, and many of the Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons were killed, and there was no time to rescue them. "

"Okay, I don't want to hear this, I'll send you another Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon to kill that Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm, if you still can't take the Winter Night Fortress, or can't inflict heavy damage on the Winter Night Fortress, you can send me to the Blood River Fortress!" the blood dragon ordered.

Blood River Fortress!

When the blood hub heard this, he trembled.

The Blood River Fortress is a meat grinder, a place where the Nine Levels of Dao Void Demons can easily fall, and his strength, if it is in the past, it is really easy to fall.

That's why he didn't want to go to the Blood River Fortress.

"Yes!"

The blood hub responded.

......

Time passes.

Whether it is the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon or the side of the Innate Origin Domain, they are all healing.

Only Ye Tian is working hard to cultivate and improve his strength.

For other supreme realms, what strength can be improved during this time of rest, and the combat effectiveness cannot be improved at all.

But Ye Tian is different, his strength is improving all the time.

this day.

Ye Tian found that the origin of the Infinite Domain was silent, not only the Infinite Domain, but also the other Innate Origin Domains.

In other words, if the Winter Night Fortress is breached, the origin of the Infinite Domain will soon be breached, and all living beings in the Infinite Domain will fall at that time.

Even Ye Tian was a little nervous at this time, he didn't want to see this happen.

"Strength, you must raise your cultivation to the peak realm of the sixfold Dao realm as soon as possible, and then impact the sevenfold to the Dao realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Time flies.

Another time passed.

After refining the Blood Spirit Liquid and various resources at all costs, his cultivation was finally promoted to the peak realm of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm before the third wave of attacks by the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

Moreover, his Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules had also improved a lot, reaching the realm of three into two, which was all the improvement brought by refining those Black Abyss Devouring Stones.

Today, he is much stronger than in the past.

"There is still time, directly impact the Sevenfold Dao Realm, although it is a bit hasty, but it will not affect me, there is a high probability that I will be able to break through!"

Ye Tian decided.
